title: Behavior Float Wander
description: Allows the mob to float around like the Ghast.

oneOf.description: Fixed duration in seconds of each float.
Range [min, max] of the random float duration in seconds.

must_reach.description: Whether the entity must reach the chosen position before reselecting.

random_reselect.description: Whether a new position is reselected while the entity floats.

xz_dist.description: Maximum horizontal distance in blocks of the random position.

y_dist.description: Maximum vertical distance in blocks of the random position.

y_offset.description: Vertical offset applied to the chosen position.
